beats.activity: Wakes up, showers, makes coffee at home.
beats.reasoning: Full energy wake-up on a Friday; morning routine folded into one beat. Night owl, so moderate wake time.

beats.activity: Skateboards from home toward Downtown Seattle.
beats.reasoning: Commute from Sammamish to Downtown; agent skateboards or bikes everywhere, so plausible for part of journey; budget 40 min for cross-town travel.

beats.activity: Works on art projects and sketches at a coffee shop.
beats.reasoning: Artist who works from coffee shops; arrives early to settle in before the 11am FIFA match. Capitol Hill is a creative hub with good coffee and vibes.

beats.activity: Quick walk to a nearby bar or cafe to catch the FIFA match.
beats.reasoning: Short walk within Capitol Hill; timing arrives just before 11am kickoff. Kremwerk is a Capitol Hill venue that shows sports.

beats.activity: Watches USA vs Wales FIFA match, hangs out.
beats.reasoning: Catches the 11am match as scheduled; free-spirited personality fits the casual venue scene. Two hours covers the match plus social time.

beats.activity: Grabs lunch and browses a nearby record shop.
beats.reasoning: Sunny Friday; light meal in Capitol Hill. Nearby vinyl shops satisfy collector hobby; 35 min for lunch and casual shopping.

beats.activity: Browses vinyl records at a local shop.
beats.reasoning: Collects vinyl; Everyday Music is a Capitol Hill institution. Sunny day keeps agent engaged in the neighborhood.

beats.activity: Bikes back toward Downtown to avoid Light Rail closure; light work at another coffee shop.
beats.reasoning: Light Rail closed Westlake–U-District until 3pm; biking avoids transit issues. Downtown Victrola is a working coffee spot; 35 min accounts for bike ride and route flexibility.

beats.activity: Works on art and designs; experiments with new sketches.
beats.reasoning: Artist work mode; afternoon productivity push. Sunny weather keeps energy high. Light Rail restriction no longer matters after 3pm.

beats.activity: Grabs an early dinner at a nearby restaurant.
beats.reasoning: Pike Place Market is iconic Downtown and fits free-spirited vibe; quick casual dinner. 40 min covers walk and meal.

beats.activity: Walks through Pike Place Market, enjoys the sunny evening.
beats.reasoning: Sunny Friday evening; soaking in the atmosphere and energy. Night owl, so evening is still prime time for agent.

beats.activity: Bikes back toward Sammamish; heads home.
beats.reasoning: Cross-town bike/transit commute from Downtown to Sammamish; 45 min is generous for evening return. Agent is home before wind-down.

beats.activity: Listens to vinyl records, sketches, and relaxes at home.
beats.reasoning: Night owl wind-down: vinyl collection, creative sketching, and chill vibes. Fits personality and provides wind-down before sleep.
7-hour sleep; ends at 6am next day as required. Night owl gets solid rest before next day.
